decision_question: Should we enter this niche market?
Which subcategory is worth funding first?
Is the target unit economics above the minimum bar?
Does the pilot achieve sample-size and margin targets?
Are customer signals strong enough to continue?
Can supply and working capital support scale-up?
Are channel ROI and payback within allowed range?
Should we trigger rollback or exit?
Is there a regulatory or platform event forcing exit?
Should remaining inventory be liquidated or redirected?
